refine_constraint: You must perform at least one interaction with the provided tools to find the answer. The response must be at least 50 words to ensure sufficient detail and completeness. Additionally, the total number of tool calls across all interaction turns must not exceed 2. Furthermore, any tool used for historical event date queries must be called no more than once.
constraint: At most 2 (Sets an upper boundary on the total number of tool calls the agent can execute across all interaction turns.)
